name: gitlens
description: Supercharge Git within VS Code — Visualize code authorship at a glance via Git blame annotations and CodeLens, seamlessly navigate and explore Git repositories, gain valuable insights via rich visualizations and powerful comparison commands, and so much more

colors.description: Specifies the background color of the file blame annotations
Specifies the foreground color of the file blame annotations
Specifies the foreground color of an uncommitted line in the file blame annotations
Specifies the background color of the inline blame annotation for the current line
Specifies the foreground color of the inline blame annotation for the current line
Specifies the background color of the associated line highlights in blame annotations
Specifies the scroll bar color of the associated line highlights in blame annotations
Specifies the icon color of open issues in the GitLens views
Specifies the icon color of closed issues in the GitLens views
Specifies the icon color of closed pull requests in the GitLens views
Specifies the icon color of open pull requests in the GitLens views
Specifies the icon color of merged pull requests in the GitLens views
Specifies the icon color of unpublished changes in the GitLens views
Specifies the icon color of unpublished commits in the GitLens views
Specifies the icon color of unpulled changes in the GitLens views
Specifies the decoration foreground color of added files
Specifies the decoration foreground color of copied files
Specifies the decoration foreground color of deleted files
Specifies the decoration foreground color of ignored files
Specifies the decoration foreground color of modified files
Specifies the decoration foreground color of untracked files
Specifies the decoration foreground color of renamed files
Specifies the decoration foreground color of branches that are ahead of their upstream
Specifies the decoration foreground color of branches that are behind their upstream
Specifies the decoration foreground color of branches that are both ahead and behind their upstream
Specifies the decoration foreground color of branches that are up to date with their upstream
Specifies the decoration foreground color of branches that are not yet published to an upstream
Specifies the decoration foreground color of branches that have a missing upstream
Specifies the decoration foreground color of the status during a rebase operation with conflicts
Specifies the decoration foreground color of the status during a rebase operation
Specifies the decoration foreground color of workspace repos which are missing a local path
Specifies the decoration foreground color of workspaces which are currently open as a Code Workspace file
Specifies the decoration foreground color of workspace repos which are open in the current workspace
Specifies the decoration foreground color for worktrees that have uncommitted changes
Specifies the decoration foreground color for worktrees cannot be found on disk
Specifies the color for the first commit lane of the _Commit Graph_ visualization
Specifies the color for the second commit lane of the _Commit Graph_ visualization
Specifies the color for the third commit lane of the _Commit Graph_ visualization
Specifies the color for the fourth commit lane of the _Commit Graph_ visualization
Specifies the color for the fifth commit lane of the _Commit Graph_ visualization
Specifies the color for the sixth commit lane of the _Commit Graph_ visualization
Specifies the color for the seventh commit lane of the _Commit Graph_ visualization
Specifies the color for the eighth commit lane of the _Commit Graph_ visualization
Specifies the color for the ninth commit lane of the _Commit Graph_ visualization
Specifies the color for the tenth commit lane of the _Commit Graph_ visualization
Specifies the color for denoting lines added in the _Changes_ column on the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color for denoting lines deleted in the _Changes_ column on the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking HEAD on the minimap of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking HEAD on the scrollbar of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking HEAD's upstream on the minimap of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking HEAD's upstream on the scrollbar of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking highlights (matches) on the minimap of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking highlights (matches) on the scrollbar of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking local branches on the minimap of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking local branches on the scrollbar of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking pull requests on the minimap of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking pull requests on the scrollbar of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking remote branches on the minimap of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking remote branches on the scrollbar of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking stashes on the minimap of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking stashes on the scrollbar of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking tags on the minimap of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color marking tags on the scrollbar of the _Commit Graph_
Specifies the color of the _Launchpad_ indicator icon when the priority is mergeable
Specifies the color of the _Launchpad_ indicator icon in the hover when the priority is mergeable
Specifies the color of the _Launchpad_ indicator icon when the priority is blocked
Specifies the color of the _Launchpad_ indicator icon in the hover when the priority is blocked
Specifies the color of the _Launchpad_ indicator icon when the priority is follow-up or needs review
Specifies the color of the _Launchpad_ indicator icon in the hover when the priority is follow-up or needs review

commandPalette.when: resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && (gitlens:window:annotated || resource in gitlens:tabs:annotated)

editor/context.when: resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && editorTextFocus && gitlens:repos:withRemotes && config.gitlens.menus.editor.remote
resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && editorTextFocus && config.gitlens.menus.editor.blame
resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && resource in gitlens:tabs:tracked && config.gitlens.menus.editor.history

editor/context/copy.when: resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && editorTextFocus && config.gitlens.menus.editor.clipboard && editorHasSelection
resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && resource in gitlens:tabs:tracked && editorTextFocus && config.gitlens.menus.editor.clipboard
resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && resource in gitlens:tabs:tracked && editorTextFocus && config.gitlens.menus.editor.clipboard
resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && resource in gitlens:tabs:tracked && editorTextFocus && config.gitlens.menus.editor.clipboard

resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && resource in gitlens:tabs:tracked && editorTextFocus && config.gitlens.menus.editor.clipboard
resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && resource in gitlens:tabs:tracked && editorTextFocus && config.gitlens.menus.editor.clipboard

editor/title.when: resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && (gitlens:window:annotated =~ /computed:changes\b/ || (resource in gitlens:tabs:annotated:changes && resource not in gitlens:tabs:annotated:computing)) && config.gitlens.menus.editorGroup.blame

resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && (gitlens:window:annotated =~ /computed:changes\b/ || (resource in gitlens:tabs:annotated:changes && resource not in gitlens:tabs:annotated:computing)) && config.gitlens.menus.editorGroup.blame

resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && (gitlens:window:annotated =~ /computed\b/ || (resource in gitlens:tabs:annotated && resource not in gitlens:tabs:annotated:computing)) && config.gitlens.menus.editorGroup.blame
resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && (gitlens:window:annotated =~ /computed\b/ || resource in gitlens:tabs:annotated:computing) && config.gitlens.menus.editorGroup.blame
resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && resource not in gitlens:tabs:annotated && config.gitlens.menus.editorGroup.blame && config.gitlens.fileAnnotations.command == blame
resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && resource not in gitlens:tabs:annotated && !gitlens:window:annotated && config.gitlens.menus.editorGroup.blame && !config.gitlens.fileAnnotations.command

resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && resource not in gitlens:tabs:annotated && !gitlens:hasVirtualFolders && config.gitlens.menus.editorGroup.blame && config.gitlens.fileAnnotations.command == changes
resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && resource not in gitlens:tabs:annotated && config.gitlens.menus.editorGroup.blame && config.gitlens.fileAnnotations.command == heatmap

resourceScheme == gitlens-ai-markdown && resource not in gitlens:tabs:ai:helpful && config.gitlens.telemetry.enabled && config.telemetry.telemetryLevel != off && activeCustomEditorId == vscode.markdown.preview.editor

resourceScheme == gitlens-ai-markdown && resource in gitlens:tabs:ai:helpful && config.gitlens.telemetry.enabled && config.telemetry.telemetryLevel != off && activeCustomEditorId == vscode.markdown.preview.editor

resourceScheme == gitlens-ai-markdown && resource not in gitlens:tabs:ai:unhelpful && config.gitlens.telemetry.enabled && config.telemetry.telemetryLevel != off && activeCustomEditorId == vscode.markdown.preview.editor

resourceScheme == gitlens-ai-markdown && resource in gitlens:tabs:ai:unhelpful && config.gitlens.telemetry.enabled && config.telemetry.telemetryLevel != off && activeCustomEditorId == vscode.markdown.preview.editor

resourceScheme == untitled && resource in gitlens:tabs:ai:changelog && resource not in gitlens:tabs:ai:helpful && config.gitlens.telemetry.enabled && config.telemetry.telemetryLevel != off && resourceLangId == markdown

resourceScheme == untitled && resource in gitlens:tabs:ai:changelog && resource in gitlens:tabs:ai:helpful && config.gitlens.telemetry.enabled && config.telemetry.telemetryLevel != off && resourceLangId == markdown

resourceScheme == untitled && resource in gitlens:tabs:ai:changelog && resource not in gitlens:tabs:ai:unhelpful && config.gitlens.telemetry.enabled && config.telemetry.telemetryLevel != off && resourceLangId == markdown

editor/title/context.when: resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && gitlens:enabled && gitlens:repos:withRemotes && config.gitlens.menus.editorTab.clipboard
resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && gitlens:enabled && gitlens:repos:withRemotes && config.gitlens.menus.editorTab.clipboard
resourceScheme in gitlens:schemes:trackable && gitlens:enabled && gitlens:repos:withRemotes && config.gitlens.menus.editorTab.remote

gitlens/editor/annotations.when: resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable && (gitlens:window:annotated || resource in gitlens:tabs:annotated)

scm/resourceGroup/context.when: scmResourceGroup == index && scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && !gitlens:readonly && !gitlens:untrusted && !gitlens:hasVirtualFolders && config.gitlens.menus.scmGroupInline.stash
scmResourceGroup == index && scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && !gitlens:readonly && !gitlens:untrusted && !gitlens:hasVirtualFolders && config.gitlens.menus.scmGroup.stash
scmResourceGroup == workingTree && scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && !gitlens:readonly && !gitlens:untrusted && !gitlens:hasVirtualFolders && config.gitlens.menus.scmGroupInline.stash
scmResourceGroup == workingTree && scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && !gitlens:readonly && !gitlens:untrusted && !gitlens:hasVirtualFolders && config.gitlens.menus.scmGroup.stash

scm/resourceState/context.when: scmResourceGroup =~ /^(workingTree|index|merge)$/ && scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && gitlens:repos:withRemotes && config.gitlens.menus.scmItem.remote
scmResourceGroup =~ /^(workingTree|index|merge)$/ && scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && gitlens:repos:withRemotes && config.gitlens.menus.scmItem.clipboard

scm/sourceControl.when: scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && !gitlens:plus:disabled && scmProviderRootUri not in gitlens:plus:disallowedRepos && config.gitlens.menus.scm.graph
scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && !gitlens:plus:disabled && scmProviderRootUri not in gitlens:plus:disallowedRepos && config.gitlens.menus.scm.visualHistory

scm/title.when: scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && !gitlens:plus:disabled && scmProviderRootUri not in gitlens:plus:disallowedRepos && config.gitlens.menus.scmRepositoryInline.graph
scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && !gitlens:plus:disabled && scmProviderRootUri not in gitlens:plus:disallowedRepos && config.gitlens.menus.scmRepositoryInline.visualHistory
scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && !gitlens:plus:disabled && scmProviderRootUri not in gitlens:plus:disallowedRepos && config.gitlens.menus.scmRepository.graph
scmProvider == git && gitlens:enabled && !gitlens:plus:disabled && scmProviderRootUri not in gitlens:plus:disallowedRepos && config.gitlens.menus.scmRepository.visualHistory

view/item/context.when: (view == gitlens.views.commits || (view == gitlens.views.scm.grouped && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == commits)) && viewItem =~ /gitlens:repo-folder\b(?=.*?\b\+filtered\b)/ && gitlens:views:commits:filtered

!listMultiSelection && (view == gitlens.views.commits || (view == gitlens.views.scm.grouped && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == commits)) && viewItem =~ /gitlens:repo-folder\b(?=.*?\b\+filtered\b)/ && gitlens:views:commits:filtered

view/title.when: view == gitlens.views.branches || view == gitlens.views.scm.grouped && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == branches
view == gitlens.views.contributors || view == gitlens.views.scm.grouped && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == contributors
view == gitlens.views.remotes || view == gitlens.views.scm.grouped && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == remotes
view == gitlens.views.repositories || view == gitlens.views.scm.grouped && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == repositories
view == gitlens.views.tags || view == gitlens.views.scm.grouped && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == tags
view == gitlens.views.worktrees || view == gitlens.views.scm.grouped && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == worktrees

keybindings.when: config.gitlens.keymap == chorded && editorTextFocus && resource in gitlens:tabs:tracked
config.gitlens.keymap == alternate && editorTextFocus && resource in gitlens:tabs:tracked
config.gitlens.keymap == alternate && editorTextFocus && resource in gitlens:tabs:tracked
config.gitlens.keymap == chorded && editorTextFocus && resource in gitlens:tabs:tracked
config.gitlens.keymap == alternate && editorTextFocus && resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable
config.gitlens.keymap == chorded && editorTextFocus && resource in gitlens:tabs:blameable

viewsWelcome.when: !gitlens:views:scm:grouped:loading && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == launchpad && gitlens:launchpad:connected && gitlens:plus:state == 4 && gitlens:promo && gitlens:promo != pro50
!gitlens:views:scm:grouped:loading && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == launchpad && gitlens:launchpad:connected && gitlens:plus:state == 4 && gitlens:promo == pro50

!gitlens:views:scm:grouped:loading && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == worktrees && !gitlens:hasVirtualFolders && gitlens:plus:required && gitlens:plus:state == 4 && gitlens:promo && gitlens:promo != pro50
!gitlens:views:scm:grouped:loading && gitlens:views:scm:grouped:view == worktrees && !gitlens:hasVirtualFolders && gitlens:plus:required && gitlens:plus:state == 4 && gitlens:promo == pro50

scripts.analyze:bundle:webviews: webpack --mode production --config-name webviews:common --config-name webviews --env analyzeBundle --env quick=turbo
scripts.build:icons: pnpm run icons:svgo && pnpm fantasticon && pnpm run icons:apply && pnpm run icons:export
scripts.build:packages: tsc -b packages/utils packages/git packages/git-cli packages/plus/git-github packages/plus/ai
scripts.clean: pnpm -r run clean && pnpx rimraf --glob dist out .vscode-test .vscode-test-web **/.eslintcache* **/tsconfig*.tsbuildinfo
scripts.clean:all: pnpm run clean && pnpm run clean:deps
scripts.package-pre: pnpm run patch-pre && pnpm run package --pre-release
scripts.rebuild: pnpm run reset && pnpm run build
scripts.web:serve: node -e "const p = require('path'); const h = require('os').homedir(); require('child_process').execSync('pnpx  serve --cors -l 5000 --ssl-cert '+p.resolve(h, 'certs/localhost.pem')+' --ssl-key '+p.resolve(h, 'certs/localhost-key.pem'), { stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.pretest: pnpm run build:tests && pnpm run test:packages
